verses.text: “Mi khat in zi la-in a ten'pih ciangin, tuanu tungah kilawm lohna a om manin numei in a pasal' mitah maipha mulo a, amah in makna lai gelhin ama tungah pia-in ama inn panin sawlkhia a, a pasal' inn panin amah kihem khia-in
amah pai-in midang khat' zi va suak a
a pasal nunung in amah deihlo leuleu a, makna lai gelhin a numei' khutsungah koih a, a inn panin tuanu sawlkhia-in, tua ahih kei leh zi dinga a la a pasal nunung a sih leh

tua numei a hawlkhia a pasal masa in, tuanu a kinitsak khit ciangin a zi dingin lakik thei nawnlo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa' mai-ah kihhuaina hi a, Topa note' Pasian un luah dingin hong piak leitang tungah mawhna na tun'pih kei ding uh hi.
“Mi khat in zi a neih tungin galkapte tawh kuankhialo ding a, nasep khat peuhpeuh zong kisawllo ding hi. A laksa a zi tawh a lungdam khawm dingin inn-ah kum khat sung maang ding hi
“Kuamah in an gawina ahi a, an gawina suangpeek a tungnung ahi zongin khapna-in lalo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khapna-in nuntakna a la suak ding hi
“Mi khat in Israel mi a sanggamte khat gu-in, amah in sila bangin a bawl ahi a, a zuak ahi zongin a kimuh leh, tua gutapa kithat ding hi. Tua bangin note' lak panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi
“Phaknatna hong tun' ciangin Levi siampite in hong gen bangin na gamtat ding uh ngaihsun un. Amaute ka thupiakna bangin na gamtatna dingun na kingaihsun ding uh hi
Egypt panin na paikhiat lai-un lampi-ah Topa na Pasian un Miriam' tungah a hihna phawk un
“Na vengte uh tungah na khat peuhpeuh leitawi na piak uh ciangin ama hong khapna a la dingin a inn-ah pai kei un
A pualamah na ding ding uh a, leitawi na piakna mipa in nang kiangah a na khap hong paipih ding hi
Amah mizawng ahih leh ama hong khap puan na zantaamsak kei ding uh a
ni a tum ciangin, a puanza silhin nang thupha hong piak theihna dingin tua hong na khap ama kiangah na piakik ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa note' Pasian' mai-ah note-a' dingin thumanna hi ding hi
“A zawng a cimawh a kicial nasempa, na sanggamte khat ahi a, na gamsung na khuapite sunga om peemta khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, na nengniam kei ding uh hi
A sep ni-in ama thaman, nitum ma-in na pia ding uh hi (bang hang hiam cih leh amah zawng a, tua bek a lungsimah om hi). Tua hi kei leh Topa' tungah amah in hong khia ding a, note na mawh ding uh hi
“Tate' tangin pate kithatlo ding a, pate' tangin zong tate kithatlo ding hi. Mi khempeuh ama khialhna hang bekin kithat ding hi
“Peemta' thu ahi a, pa neilo mi' thu ahi zongin tuate-a' ding thutang na heisak kei ding uh a, meigong numei' puan zong khapna-in na laksak kei ding uh hi
Egypt-ah sila na hihna uh leh Topa note' Pasian in tua lai panin hong hotkhiatna na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih banga na gamtatna ding uh thu kong pia hi

“Na lo-ah an la-in lo lai-ah anlom na mangngilh uh ciangin a tawm dingin na paikik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa neilo, leh meigong numeite-a' ding ahi hi. Hih pen Topa note' Pasian in na khut uh tawh na sepna khempeuh uhah note thupha hong piak theihna ding ahi hi
Na oliv kungte uh na sat uh ciangin a hiangte na sat kikkik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa neilo, leh meigong numeite-a' ding ahi hi
Na leenggui lo panun leenggah na kaihkhop uh ciangin a sang na nung khop kik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa neilo, leh meigong numeite-a' ding ahi hi
Egypt gamah sila na hihna uh na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih bangin na gamtatna dingun thu kong pia hi.
